profile.personality: The Secale constitutional type is a thin, emaciated, prematurely aged individual with a withered, scrawny appearance and unhealthy skin. They are restless and paradoxical in nature—feeling intensely hot internally while being ice-cold externally, craving open air and wanting to be uncovered despite objective coldness. Their vital force is depleted, lending them a worn-out, dried-up quality that manifests both physically and temperamentally.
profile.mental_state: The mental state tends toward active mania with great excitement, loss of propriety, and disregard for social norms—modesty is entirely abandoned during acute episodes. Convulsions beginning in the face accompany mental disturbance, and the nervous and mental symptoms characteristically worsen during hemorrhagic episodes. There is a hysterical diathesis with spasmodic, erratic mental functioning that reflects the underlying circulatory and nervous degeneration.
profile.emotional_pattern: The emotional pattern is dominated by a desperate, self-destructive impulsivity—exemplified by the willingness to risk death rather than endure an unwanted situation, followed by deep regret and chronic suffering. There is profound despair about health, as these patients recognize they have placed themselves beyond help, carrying a lingering sense of damage that cannot be undone. The emotional life is marked by restless agitation, hypersensitivity, and an inability to tolerate confinement or warmth, always seeking relief through exposure and openness.

rubric_passages.Back, pain: Numbness and burning down the whole length of the spine
rubric_passages.Chill: Wants cold though the limbs are cold as ice, wants to be uncovered, wants the windows open
rubric_passages.Extremities: The extremities prickle, burn, and tingle; creeping and crawling, as of insects under the skin, as if between the skin and the flesh; numb, dead, wooden sensation in the fingers and especially in the toes.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: the skin burns; the extremities burn, sensation of burning when the parts feel cold to the touch and really are cold, a sensation of heat with coldness.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness, hands: purplish spots on withered skin, especially where the circulation is feeble as on the back of the hands and feet
rubric_passages.Generalities: The general constitutional state is aggravated from heat; there are only a few exceptions to this.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Burning, especially of internal parts. Dryness with burning; burning in the stomach and bowels; dryness and burning in the mouth and throat, the nose and air passages; burning in the lungs.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: Nosebleed, blood dark, runs continually, with great prostration, small thread-like pulse
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Prolonged uterine haemorrhage so that one menstrual nisus runs into another; withered subjects; considerable flow on the first day, fluid, and blackish; this goes on for a couple of weeks and then a dark watery flow comes on which lasts until the next period.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Active manias with great excitement; exposes her body and tears at the genitals; puts her finger in the vagina and scratches until the lips bleed
rubric_passages.Head: headache worse in cold air
rubric_passages.Mind: Active manias with great excitement; exposes her body and tears at the genitals; puts her finger in the vagina and scratches until the lips bleed; all idea of modesty lost.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: The spasms, nervous, and mental symptoms are worse while she is flowing, so that a puerperal convulsion comes on in the midst of a hemorrhage.
rubric_passages.Mouth: dryness and burning in the mouth and throat
rubric_passages.Rectum: horrible, offensive, bloody discharge from the bowels
rubric_passages.Skin: Emaciated, withered, wrinkled, unhealthy appearance of the skin; purplish, bluish skin, general or in spots
rubric_passages.Stomach: burning in the stomach and bowels
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: Violent inflammation of any part of the body; gangrenous pneumonia; gastritis; peritonitis
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain, burning: Dryness with burning; burning in the stomach and bowels
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: extreme sensitiveness and tenderness to touch, so that motion or jar is unbearable
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness: Asiatic cholera with collapse, sunken, distorted face
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: sharp, stinging neuralgic pains, which burn like fire and cut like a knife

profile.personality: A deeply exhausted and depleted individual who has been worn down by excess — whether sexual, alcoholic, or prolonged illness. They are someone whose vital force has been profoundly drained, leaving them unfit for work, dreading company, yet paradoxically becoming excitable and talkative in the evening.
profile.mental_state: The mind is dull, confused, and extremely forgetful during waking hours, yet remarkably active in sleep where forgotten things are remembered in dreams. Mental exertion is utterly exhausting; they mispronounce words, stammer, fail to understand what they read or hear, and have become incompetent in business affairs. The mind dwells persistently on lascivious thoughts despite physical impotence, creating a painful split between desire and capacity.
profile.emotional_pattern: Extreme sadness and indifference to surroundings form the emotional baseline, punctuated by irritability — especially after sexual emissions or sleep. There is an irresistible craving for alcoholic stimulants suggesting a pattern of self-medicating emotional pain, and a deep dread of social interaction born not from anxiety but from the sheer exhaustion that human contact demands.

rubric_passages.Back: Weak back and spine as if he would be paralyzed after typhoid fever, and other lingering diseases. Stiffening neck on turning head; lameness in back in the morning.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Involuntary urination while walking, after urination and after stool. Twinge of pain outward along the urethra with a sensation as though drops were pouring out. Sensation as if biting drop was forcing itself out. The urine is dark, scanty, red in evening. Sediment coarse, red and sandy.
rubric_passages.Chest: Dry, hacking cough in the morning, weak feeling in the chest. Expectoration of lumps of bloody mucus. Difficult breathing from any exertion and from mucus in the chest and air passages. Pain in right side of chest under lowest ribs extending to kidneys which are tender to pressure.
rubric_passages.Extremities: It has cured syphilitic psoriasis of the palms. Itching palms. Hands withered. Tearing pains in hands at night. Emaciation of the legs. Great weakness of lower limbs. Itching of the ankle in the evening, blisters on the toes. Flat ulcers on the legs and about the ankles. Cramps in calves and soles.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Great fatigue from which he seems unable to recuperate from rest. Slight exertion brings great fatigue and weakness and especially in hot weather. Sudden weakness in hot weather. Extremely sensitive to a draft of air, cool, warm or damp. Marked general emaciation, also special emaciation of face, thighs and hands.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: Great fatigue from which he seems unable to recuperate from rest. Slight exertion brings great fatigue and weakness and especially in hot weather. Sudden weakness in hot weather. Great weakness in the back, almost paralytic after typhoid fever or other temporary diseases.
rubric_passages.Head: Headaches from strong odors, after wine, tea, lemonade and alcoholic stimulants, violent stinging over left eye when walking in the heat of the sun. Increased flow of urine in headaches. Headaches in old drunkards. The hair falls out from the whole head, leaving the scalp smooth and hairless; also the hair falls from the eyebrows and face, giving a strange appearance. The scalp feels as though tightly drawn over the bones of the skull.
rubric_passages.Mind: Extreme sadness. He is indifferent to his surroundings and his mind is dull and in confusion. He is very forgetful during his waking hours, but in sleep he dreams what he has forgotten. Makes mistakes in syllables and mispronounces words. Stammering speech. Often fails to understand what he hears or reads. He has become unfit for his business. Mental exertion is exhaustive and he dreads company. His mind dwells on lascivious thoughts, yet he is sometimes impotent.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Constipation with inactivity of the rectum. Most difficult stool, even impaction. Stool large, hard and very dry, requires mechanical aid.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Constipation with inactivity of the rectum. Most difficult stool, even impaction. Stool large, hard and very dry, requires mechanical aid.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Difficult breathing from any exertion and from mucus in the chest and air passages. Hoarseness on beginning to use the voice. Hoarseness from weakness after over-use of the voice for a long time. Much clear, starchy mucus scraped from the larynx.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: Difficult breathing from any exertion and from mucus in the chest and air passages.
rubric_passages.Skin: Moist itching spots here and there on the skin and tingling after eruptions have been treated locally. Flat ulcers. Itching about finger joints and between fingers.
rubric_passages.Stomach: After eating pulsation all over the body, especially in the abdomen. Symptoms are worse from sugar, salt food, tea and lemonade. White tongue and he does not relish his breakfast.
rubric_passages.Back, weakness: Great weakness in the back, almost paralytic after typhoid fever or other temporary diseases. Weak back and spine as if he would be paralyzed after typhoid fever, and other lingering diseases.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: Involuntary urination while walking, after urination and after stool. Twinge of pain outward along the urethra with a sensation as though drops were pouring out. Sensation as if biting drop was forcing itself out. The urine is dark, scanty, red in evening. Sediment coarse, red and sandy.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side: Pain in right side of chest under lowest ribs extending to kidneys which are tender to pressure. Soreness in liver from pressure and inspiration, with rash over the right hypochondrium. Searching pain in right hypochondrium, worse on deep breathing. Violent stinging over left eye when walking in the heat of the sun.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: Great fatigue from which he seems unable to recuperate from rest. Slight exertion brings great fatigue and weakness and especially in hot weather. Sudden weakness in hot weather. Great weakness in the back, almost paralytic after typhoid fever or other temporary diseases.
rubric_passages.Appetite: Aversion to food much salted. White tongue and he does not relish his breakfast. Irresistible longing for strong drink.
rubric_passages.Appetite, desires: Irresistible desire for alcoholic stimulants. Irresistible longing for strong drink.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It is said to be incompatible with China. It is much like Sulphur in general action, and Phos. acid in its action upon the nervous system and genitals. The chest symptoms and expectoration are like Argentum met., Stannum. Its constipation is much like Alumen and Alumina. It should be carefully compared with these remedies. In syphilitics it often checks the falling of the hair. III chronic gonorrhea it is a very useful remedy.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: After eating pulsation all over the body, especially in the abdomen. Pulsating in the abdomen during pregnancy, worse after eating. Soreness in liver from pressure and inspiration, with rash over the right hypochondrium. Searching pain in right hypochondrium, worse on deep breathing. The liver is enlarged. Stitching pains in liver from motion and pressure.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: Pulsation in all the limbs and in the abdomen after eating. After eating pulsation all over the body, especially in the abdomen.
rubric_passages.Face: The face is sickly, looking greasy and shiny. Great emaciation of the face. Twitching of the muscles of the face. Itching vesicles on the edges of the eyelids and spasmodic twitching of left eyeball.
rubric_passages.Head, pain: Headaches from strong odors, after wine, tea, lemonade and alcoholic stimulants, violent stinging over left eye when walking in the heat of the sun. Increased flow of urine in headaches. Headaches in old drunkards.
rubric_passages.Stool: Most difficult stool, even impaction. Stool large, hard and very dry, requires mechanical aid. Softy pasty stool. Watery diarrhoea.
rubric_passages.Stool, hard: Stool large, hard and very dry, requires mechanical aid.
rubric_passages.Chest, oppression: Weak feeling in the chest. Difficult breathing from any exertion and from mucus in the chest and air passages.
rubric_passages.Genitalia male: Extreme weakness of the male genitalia. Though the desire is strong there are no erections, or the act of coition is unsatisfactory and incomplete. Frequent emissions and constant flow of prostatic fluid. Erections in the morning without sexual desire, but on attempting coition the penis becomes relaxed. Itching and formication of genitalia.

profile.personality: A pale, weakly, anemic young woman prone to chlorosis ('green sickness') who is constitutionally delicate and sensitive to environmental influences. She is easily affected by cold, damp conditions and drafts of air, reflecting a fragile constitution that struggles to maintain vital functions.
profile.mental_state: Marked by nervous irritability and lassitude, with a general mental weariness that accompanies the progressive physical decline. The mental state reflects the underlying vital depletion, with diminished energy and a passive susceptibility to illness rather than active mental disturbance.
profile.emotional_pattern: The emotional pattern centers on a quiet, resigned suffering with deepening fatigue and withdrawal as the constitutional state deteriorates. There is an underlying vulnerability and sensitivity, with the emotional life suppressed much as the menstrual flow is suppressed, the vital force turning inward and expressing through vicarious channels such as hemorrhage and catarrhal discharges.

rubric_passages.Chest: There is a catarrhal state throughout the chest. They are pallid and weakly girls. They tell you they have lost their menstrual flow, and have a chronic cough, are sensitive to every draft of air, are always taking cold and finally expectorate profusely.
rubric_passages.Generalities: You will be struck on reading over this remedy with the tendency to hemorrhage from all the mucous membranes of the body. There is coryza with nose-bleed; spitting of blood from the throat and chest; hemorrhage from the lungs; a catarrhal condition of all the mucous membranes with a tendency to haemorrhage: congestion and inflammation of the kidneys with haemorrhage.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Senecio, is to be studied in relation to young girls with menstrual irregularities. Those who have suppression of the menstrual flow from getting wet, from getting the feet wet, those who have menorrhagia, a copious menstrual flow which continues until they are anemic; and those also who suffer from dysmenorrheea, the pains being most violent.
rubric_passages.Clinical: When the symptoms agree in this kind of a case Senecio is a most useful medicine for establishing the menstrual flow. You will know that it is acting well by the fact that the cough gradually diminishes.
rubric_passages.Face: You know how commonly these cases end in dropsy. These waxy, anaemic, chlorotic girls, who have lost their menstrual flow, become dropsical after slow hemorrhage from the uterus, kidneys and bladder.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, menses, suppressed: Those who have suppression of the menstrual flow from getting wet, from getting the feet wet... The menstrual flow is suppressed sometimes many months, she begins to look pale, has a dry, hacking cough, with bleeding from the lungs instead of the menstrual flow, a vicarious spitting of blood.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, menses: Senecio, is to be studied in relation to young girls with menstrual irregularities. Those who have suppression of the menstrual flow from getting wet, from getting the feet wet, those who have menorrhagia, a copious menstrual flow which continues until they are anemic; and those also who suffer from dysmenorrheea, the pains being most violent.
rubric_passages.Urine: It has also in its proving many distressing symptoms of the urinary organs. Painful urination. Uncomfortable heat in the neck of the bladder. Renal colic, the pains being so great that they produce nausea. Renal dropsy. Intense pain over right kidney, etc. The whole urinary tract is painful and subject to bleeding.
rubric_passages.Chest, inflammation, bronchial tubes (br: There is a catarrhal state throughout the chest... a catarrhal condition of all the mucous membranes with a tendency to haemorrhage.
rubric_passages.Chest, phthisis pulmonalis: "Phthisis, with obstructed menstruation." When the symptoms agree in this kind of a case Senecio is a most useful medicine for establishing the menstrual flow. You will know that it is acting well by the fact that the cough gradually diminishes.
rubric_passages.Chest, phthisis pulmonalis, incipient: In this remedy, with these general features, the young girl gradually tends toward catarrhal phthisis. The menstrual flow is suppressed sometimes many months, she begins to look pale, has a dry, hacking cough, with bleeding from the lungs instead of the menstrual flow, a vicarious spitting of blood.
rubric_passages.Face, chlorotic: These waxy, anaemic, chlorotic girls, who have lost their menstrual flow, become dropsical after slow hemorrhage from the uterus, kidneys and bladder.
rubric_passages.Clinical, chlorosis: Leucorrhoea especially in chlorotic girls. It is a marked remedy in chlorosis, in the anemic state with a green hue, called "green sickness" by the laity.
rubric_passages.Chest, inflammation: Wherever there is an inflammatory spot or catarrhal condition of the mucous membrane it will bleed in case the menstrual flow does not appear.
rubric_passages.Clinical, inflammation: congestion and inflammation of the kidneys with haemorrhage... Wherever there is an inflammatory spot or catarrhal condition of the mucous membrane it will bleed in case the menstrual flow does not appear.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, menses, absent, amenor: "Amenorrhoea from a cold; nervous irritability; lassitude; dropsy."
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, menses, copious: those who have menorrhagia, a copious menstrual flow which continues until they are anemic
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, menses, delayed in gir: Senecio, is to be studied in relation to young girls with menstrual irregularities... In certain regions, Senecio has been used as a domestic medicine, an old woman's remedy for bringing on the menstrual flow.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, menses, protracted: those who have menorrhagia, a copious menstrual flow which continues until they are anemic
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, menses, absent: The menstrual flow is suppressed sometimes many months, she begins to look pale, has a dry, hacking cough, with bleeding from the lungs instead of the menstrual flow, a vicarious spitting of blood.
rubric_passages.Chest, phthisis pulmonalis, pituitous: The phthisis may go on as catarrh of the chest for years... "Mucous rattling with suppressed cough."
rubric_passages.Chest, phthisis pulmonalis, acute: The phthisis may go on as catarrh of the chest for years, but at last a miliary tuberculosis sets in and takes the patient off with what is known as acute consumption. Especially is this condition associated with disorder of the menstrual flow and a general catarrhal state.
rubric_passages.Chest, phthisis pulmonalis, acute, mense: The phthisis may go on as catarrh of the chest for years, but at last a miliary tuberculosis sets in and takes the patient off with what is known as acute consumption. Especially is this condition associated with disorder of the menstrual flow and a general catarrhal state.
rubric_passages.Back: "Dysmenorrhoea with urinary symptoms; cutting in sacral and hypogastric regions."

profile.personality: A restless, physically driven individual who cannot tolerate stillness and feels compelled to keep moving despite deep exhaustion. The Senega type endures suffering with a stoic, uncomplaining quality, yet is fundamentally worn down and fragile, often presenting in elderly or depleted constitutions.
profile.mental_state: The mind is dominated by a sense of oppression and narrowing, mirroring the physical sensation that the chest is too narrow. There is a persistent, unrelenting quality to their mental experience—a constant irritation that leaves them not a moment's rest, preventing calm or repose.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional experience is a fear of suffocation and a deep distress born from the inability to expel what burdens them. There is an underlying anxiety tied to physical vulnerability, a sense of struggling against something tenacious and overwhelming that they cannot quite dislodge or resolve.

rubric_passages.Back: Pain under right scapula when coughing.
rubric_passages.Chest: Senega is more especially a chest medicine. It is full of chest symptoms and its relation to the air passages makes it worthy of consideration, although many of the individualizing symptoms have not yet been brought out.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Senega is a remedy of deep action, as well as an acute remedy. It is filled with sharp and acute sufferings, sufferings that come on with rapidity, from taking cold, or from a cold that involves the whole chest.
rubric_passages.Head: The concussion from the cough causes discharge of urine involuntarily and causes violent pains in the head and over the eyes.
rubric_passages.Mouth: A very little of this medicine in proving will produce such a dryness and metallic taste in the mouth, and such a tickling at the root of the tongue, the pharynx and larynx, and it will finally end in a copious, thick, gluey discharge.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Most violent suffocation with asthma. Short breathing and oppression of chest when going up stairs. Dyspnoea especially during rest.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: It is filled with sharp and acute sufferings, sufferings that come on with rapidity, from taking cold, or from a cold that involves the whole chest.
rubric_passages.Clinical: A violent attack of pleurisy associated with pneumonia, too deep and too vicious for Bryonia, often finds its remedy in Senega. Senega is a sort of cross between Bryonia and Rhus tox.
rubric_passages.Back, dorsal region, back: Pain under right scapula when coughing.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: From its most striking action on the mucous membrane of the air passages, its chief use has been in chest complaints, asthmatic complaints, in various forms of dyspnoea, cardiac and asthmatic.
rubric_passages.Back, dorsal region: Pain under right scapula when coughing.
rubric_passages.Chest, pain: There are violent pains in the chest, especially like those of pleurisy. The pains are increased and it seems as if the chest would be torn on coughing. Walls of the chest sensitive or painful when touched.
rubric_passages.Head, pain: The concussion from the cough causes discharge of urine involuntarily and causes violent pains in the head and over the eyes.
rubric_passages.Throat: When Senega is indicated there is a dryness in the mouth and throat, and the cough is incessant; there is a constant metallic coppery taste in the mouth and throat, as if he were coughing up pulverized copper.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, pressing: Eyes pain as if pressed out.
rubric_passages.Chest, lungs: Profuse secretion of mucus in lungs of old people. Great rattling of mucus in chest and flying pains in chest.
rubric_passages.Chest, oppression: Sensation as if the chest were too narrow. Short breathing and oppression of chest when going up stairs.
rubric_passages.Eye: Paralysis of the muscles of the eyes. Iritis and specks upon the cornea. Paresis of the superior oblique. Blepharitis.
rubric_passages.Eye, pain: Aching over the orbits. Eyes pain as if pressed out.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea: Constant tickling and burning in the larynx, leaving the patient not a moment's rest and preventing him from lying down; fear of suffocation. Aphonia from severe cold or excessive use of the voice.
rubric_passages.Urine: The concussion from the cough causes discharge of urine involuntarily and causes violent pains in the head and over the eyes.
rubric_passages.Vision: It has cured opacity of the vitreous humor.

profile.personality: A tall, slim, sallow woman who has become emotionally flat and intellectually dulled, often appearing prematurely aged. She is irritable, obstinate, permits no opposition, and vents spite on those she loves best, yet simultaneously dreads being alone. Her temperament swings unpredictably between yielding gentleness and disagreeable obstinacy.
profile.mental_state: The mind is sluggish, stupid, and forgetful, with slow thinking and an inability to perform mental labor. She may appear intoxicated or benumbed, answering questions only in monosyllables when pressed, and sits in taciturn melancholy saying nothing. There is fear of insanity, fear of poverty, fear of ghosts, and a sense that unseen figures fill the atmosphere around her.
profile.emotional_pattern: The most striking feature is the abolition of natural affection — she knows she ought to love her husband and children but feels nothing, as if all capacity for warmth has been stilled. She finds no joy in life, all things seem strange and unreal, and she is worse in company yet dreads solitude. This emotional deadness alternates with spells of weeping, sarcasm, and a compulsion to annoy others and relate her grievances.

rubric_passages.Back: One of Sepia's most general characteristics is the amelioration from violent exercise; worse on beginning to move but better by getting warmed up. This condition is closely related to the back symptoms. There is a great amount of soreness in the back, the spine aches all the way down. Pressure on the spine reveals sore places, spinal irritation.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Aching in the back mostly from the loins to the coccyx, often coming on from sitting, and ameliorated from violent exercise. A peculiar feature is amelioration from hard pressure. The patient commonly puts a book low down on the chair and presses the back against it. Sepia does not seem to get the amelioration from lying upon the back as Natrum mur. does. Stooping aggravates the backache.
rubric_passages.Back, pain, dorsal region: There is a great amount of soreness in the back, the spine aches all the way down. Pressure on the spine reveals sore places, spinal irritation.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Sepia is compelled to keep the mind on the neck of the bladder or she will lose the urine; urine is lost when coughing, sneezing, laughing, the slam of a door, a shock, or when the mind is diverted.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, frequent: Frequent, constant urging to urinate with milky urine that burns like fire and after standing a while a milky, grayish deposit will form which is hard to wash off the vessel.
rubric_passages.Chest: Catarrh of the chest with thick, tenacious, yellow expectoration, accompanied with a violent cough, retching, gagging, violent prolonged retching, vomiting; dry cough and yet there is rattling.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: The sleep is full of dreams and distress; cannot sleep upon the left side because of palpitation of the heart. Palpitation in sleep, with pulsations and trembling all over the body, pulsations to the finger tips.
rubric_passages.Chill: In old cases of suppressed malaria, Sepia brings back the chill, but its most useful sphere is after a bad selection of the remedy and the case becomes confused. Where a remedy has been selected for only a part of the case and changed it a little but the patient gets no better.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Under symptoms of the lower extremities we find great numbness of the feet. Swelling of the limbs better while walking.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: Coldness of the legs and feet especially in the evening in bed when the feet get warm the hands get cold; icy coldness of the feet profuse sweat of the feet or sweat of unbearable odor causing soreness between the toes.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness, hands: Coldness of the legs and feet especially in the evening in bed when the feet get warm the hands get cold.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The Sepia symptoms are worse in the open air unless combined with continued motion, better from exercise in the open air and worse in the house.
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness, fainting: Nausea violent; deathly sinking accompanied with an awful anxiety in the stomach.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Frequent, constant urging to urinate with milky urine that burns like fire. Acrid, burning eructations; heartburn; rancid eructations, excoriating the throat; pyrosis which is another form of eructation; acrid, sour fluids burning all the way up, causing contraction, tingling, smarting.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: No endurance, tired after coition, sleepless nights, sleep full of dreams, jerking of muscles, twitching, leucorrhoea, congestion of the pelvis.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Both male and female have aversion to the opposite sex. In the female there is a state as if she had indulged to excess, when this is not the case. No endurance, tired after coition, sleepless nights, sleep full of dreams, jerking of muscles, twitching, leucorrhoea, congestion of the pelvis.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Most violent dysmenorrhoea in girls of delicate fiber, sallow girls.
rubric_passages.Head: The headaches are nervous, bilious, periodic, violent, involving the whole head; congestive. Generally better lying down, keeping perfectly quiet; worse from ordinary motion, but relieved by violent motion, like most Sepia symptoms in general; she can walk off her sufferings.
rubric_passages.Mind: One of the strongest features of the Sepia patient is found in the mind, the state of the affections. To a great extent, the remedy seems to abolish the ability to feel natural love, to be affectionate.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Passionate, irritable; the greatest irritability from slight causes, very easily offended. Vexed and disposed to scold.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: She who has been excitable, nervous, and fidgety becomes the opposite, cold, takes on a stoical state of mind. Yet Sepia has all the excitability of any medicine, aggravated by noises, excitement, company, extreme irritability of tissue and mind.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The gums settle away from the teeth. Toothache and neuralgia from taking cold.
rubric_passages.Rectum: There is always a sense of fullness in the rectum after stool; ineffectual straining and sweating in the effort because the patient is weak and exhausted. Prolapse of the rectum. Weight as of a ball in the anus not relieved by stool. Soreness of the anus.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: The bowels lose their ability to expel their contents and the patient is always constipated; constipation during pregnancy; slow, difficult stool; stool like sheep dung. Always has a feeling of a lump in the rectum, never able to empty the bowels; though he goes to stool there is always a sensation of a lump remaining in the rectum.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: Weight as of a ball in the anus not relieved by stool. Soreness of the anus.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Whooping cough; asthmatic cough with retching and loss of urine. Spasmodic dry cough in the evening until midnight; holds the chest during the cough.

profile.personality: A yielding, mild, and gentle temperament that lacks stamina and firmness, much like a stalk of grain without its silica coating. The patient is timid, retiring, and wants to shirk responsibilities, yet when forced into action can perform with surprising competence and accuracy.
profile.mental_state: Marked by a profound dread of failure and fear of undertaking any task, despite possessing the actual ability to succeed. The mind is weakened from prolonged mental effort, producing a brain-fag characteristic of professional and studious persons — clergymen, lawyers, students — who have exhausted themselves through sustained intellectual work and sleepless nights.
profile.emotional_pattern: Deeply anxious and lacking self-confidence, with an underlying irritability and irascibility that emerges when provoked, though the default state is one of tearful mildness and gentle withdrawal. Religious melancholy, sadness, despondency, and a pervasive sense of embarrassment and self-consciousness dominate, with the patient feeling their own selfhood so acutely that they cannot lose themselves in their work or public duties.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, hard: Enlarged abdomen in children and adults (Bar. c.); tightness across the abdomen.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, rumbling: Abdominal pain relieved by heat; distension of the bowels with flatulence and rumbling.
rubric_passages.Back: exhausted if he has coition with anything like ordinary frequency; it takes him a week or ten days to rest up (Agar.). Much sweating of the genitals with exhaustion, tired out in the spine, weak back.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: tired out in the spine, weak back.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Suppurative conditions in the urinary tract, catarrh of the mucous membranes; old inveterate catarrh of the bladder with pus and blood in the urine; copious, stringy, deposits in the urine.
rubric_passages.Chest: The Silica cough is a dangerous one; the remedy suits the early stage of phthisis, when the lung is not extensively involved; it suits cough of catarrhal character when the symptoms agree.
rubric_passages.Chill: An offensive foot-sweat ceases after getting the feet wet, and is followed by chills and violent complaints.
rubric_passages.Chill, trembling and shivering: he wants warmth, dread the cold, is always shivering.
rubric_passages.Extremities: In the extremities we have inflammation of the periosteum. Corns (Ant. cr., Graph.). Ingrowing toe-nails. Rheumatism of the soles of the feet. Cannot walk (Ant. cr., Med., Ruta, Sil.).
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: cold extremities while the upper part of the body is hot, sweat about the head and neck, sensation of heat and suffocation in a warm room.
rubric_passages.Generalities: At certain times of the year and under certain circumstances peculiar symptoms will come out. They may stay with the prover the balance of his life. Such are the long-acting, deep-acting remedies; they are capable of going so thoroughly into the vital order that hereditary disturbances are routed out. The Silica patient is chilly; his symptoms are developed in cold, damp weather, though often better in cold, dry weather; symptoms come out after a bath.
better from pressure and heat and attended with profuse head-sweat.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: The patient lacks stamina. What Silica is to the stalk of, grain in the field, it is to the human mind.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: In women a prostrated condition of the sexual functions. Serous cysts in the vagina, fistulous openings and abscesses about the vulva, which heal with hard nodules or do not heal at all; little oozing fistulae, offensive, cheesy discharge.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Leucorrhea, profuse, acrid, corroding, milky, preceded by cutting around the navel, causing biting pain, especially after acrid food; during urination; in gushes; with cancer of the uterus.
rubric_passages.Head: Chronic sick-headache attended with nausea and even vomiting. Headache commencing in the back of the head in the morning or towards noon going to the forehead, worse towards night, from noise; better from heat; supra-orbital neuralgias; better from pressure and heat and attended with profuse head-sweat.
rubric_passages.Mind: The patient lacks stamina. What Silica is to the stalk of, grain in the field, it is to the human mind. Take the glossy, stiff, outer covering of a stalk of grain and examine it, and you will realize with what firmness it supports the head of grain until it ripens; there is a gradual deposit of Silica in it to give it stamina. So it is with the mind; when the mind needs Silica it is in a state of weakness, embarrassment, dread, a state of yielding.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Irritable and irascible when aroused; when let alone he is timid, retiring, wants to shirk everything; mild, gentle tearful women. The Silica child is cross and cries when spoken to.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Silica is not suitable for the irritability and nervous exhaustion coming on from business brain-fag, but more for such brain-fag as belongs to professional men, students, lawyers, clergymen.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The tongue takes on inflammation of gouty character; inflammation with threatening abscess, it fills the whole mouth; rending, tearing pains, worse at night and better from heat.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Silica has removed tape-worm, when the symptoms agree(Calc., Sulf.) It has also cured fistulous openings. Patients who have a tendency to phthisis are subject to abscesses about the region of the rectum, that break inside or out and form complete or incomplete openings.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Constipation from inability of the rectum to expel the faeces. It is seldom that the stool lies in the rectum without urging like Alumina; there is much urging to stool but inability to expel. The stool may be in small balls or large and soft or large and hard, but there is much straining and sweating about the head and great suffering while straining; the rectum becomes impacted, he strains until he is weak and exhausted, the stool slips back; and he gives up in despair.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: the rectum becomes impacted, he strains until he is weak and exhausted, the stool slips back; and he gives up in despair. The only way he can relieve himself is by some mechanical method.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Humid asthma, coarse rattling, the chest seems filled with mucus, seems as if he would suffocate.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: Humid asthma, coarse rattling, the chest seems filled with mucus, seems as if he would suffocate. Especially the asthma of old sycotics, or in children of sycotic parents.

profile.personality: A debilitated, run-down individual who is highly sensitive to cold, atmospheric changes, and all forms of stimulation including noise, light, motion, and even mental exertion. They sit transfixed and still, avoiding movement because any jarring or activity intensifies their suffering.
profile.mental_state: Weak memory with marked disinclination to work and an inability to concentrate, as even thinking aggravates their complaints. Restless and anxious with solicitude about the future, yet paradoxically may sit motionless to avoid provoking pain. So nervous at times that they feel they must fly, full of excitement, unable to keep still or maintain self-control.
profile.emotional_pattern: Gloomy with a suicidal mood, easily irritated or offended by the slightest provocation. Harbors peculiar fears, especially of pointed things such as pins, and carries a deep anxiety and apprehension about the future. The intensity of their suffering leaves its mark both physically and emotionally, producing prostration, cold sweat, and a state of nervous exhaustion.

profile.personality: A chilly, physically sensitive constitution who craves warmth and cannot tolerate the least draft. Not hysterical or emotionally demonstrative; the vital force expresses itself through shifting physical complaints rather than psychological displays.
profile.mental_state: Kent's lecture reveals remarkably few mental symptoms, suggesting a remedy picture dominated by physical pathology rather than mental disturbance. The patient is not delirious or confused but is burdened by the exhausting cycle of spasmodic coughing, gagging, and involuntary discharges that consume their energy.
profile.emotional_pattern: Notably lacking the tearfulness of Pulsatilla or the hysteria of Ignatia despite sharing some physical similarities with both. The emotional state is one of quiet, uncomplaining endurance marked by an eagerness for relief — as seen in the child who seizes the cup eagerly yet can only manage small sips.

rubric_passages.Bladder: Copious, colorless urine is one of its important symptoms and resembles Ign., but Squil. is not a hysterical patient like Ign.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, frequent: Squil. in its internal nature is quite like Thuja in regard to its spurting urine and its spasmodic cough; with the escape of urine there is more or less of escape of faeces of a dark brown or black fluid in frothy bubbles, very offensive, painless, involuntary.
rubric_passages.Chest: Pains in the chest aggravated in the morning. Dull rheumatic pains aggravated when exercising; ameliorated while at rest. Evening dry cough with sweetish expectoration. Great heat in the body.
rubric_passages.Chill: Patient chilly cannot have the least draft; wants plenty of clothing and is very sensitive to cold.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Squilla was given in the olden times by the old school in all lung, bronchial, and kidney affections; pneumonia, asthma, scanty urine and dropsical affections.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: About 1 A.M. to 12 or 1 P.M. there is the most dyspnoea from filling up of the chest with mucus; this same feeling returns during the hour, but it is from cardiac weakness.
rubric_passages.Head: Quite similar to Can. Ind. or Gels. in brain affections, but Squil. has not many brain affections nor many febrile symptoms.
rubric_passages.Rectum: with the escape of urine there is more or less of escape of faeces of a dark brown or black fluid in frothy bubbles, very offensive, painless, involuntary.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Respiration difficult with stitches in the chest when breathing and coughing. Great dyspnoea, the child cannot drink; seizes the cup eagerly, but can drink only in sips; frequently obliged to take a deep breath which provokes a cough; shortness of breath on every exertion.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: Great dyspnoea, the child cannot drink; seizes the cup eagerly, but can drink only in sips; frequently obliged to take a deep breath which provokes a cough; shortness of breath on every exertion.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: Urine is generally copious, watery, colorless.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Dull rheumatic pains aggravated when exercising; ameliorated while at rest.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side: Stitches when inhaling, jerking pains; always right side.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: About 1 A.M. to 12 or 1 P.M. there is the most dyspnoea from filling up of the chest with mucus; this same feeling returns during the hour, but it is from cardiac weakness.
rubric_passages.Appetite: the child cannot drink; seizes the cup eagerly, but can drink only in sips.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Follows well after Bry. Absolute lack of sweat is a characteristic.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: About 1 A.M. to 12 or 1 P.M. there is the most dyspnoea from filling up of the chest with mucus; this same feeling returns during the hour, but it is from cardiac weakness.
rubric_passages.Chest, pain: Stitches when inhaling, jerking pains; always right side; catarrh of the chest and threatened pneumonia after hemorrhage from the lungs. Soreness in the chest, worse from motion.
rubric_passages.Generalities, morning: Pains in the chest aggravated in the morning. Nasal discharge acrid, corroding, worse in the morning; violent sneezing.

profile.personality: A constitutionally weakened individual who has been declining over a long period, becoming increasingly averse to work and activity. They are deeply fatigued, finding all effort irksome, whether business duties or household tasks, with a progressive loss of vitality that shows in their waxy, sallow appearance.
profile.mental_state: The mind becomes stunned and overwhelmed during intense pain, with diminished capacity for mental exertion. There is a growing inability to engage with responsibilities, not from laziness but from a deep-seated exhaustion that affects both mental and physical functioning.
profile.emotional_pattern: Marked by a resigned weariness and increasing sensitivity — hypersensitive to pain, to cold, to every change in weather and environment. There is a passive, yielding quality to their suffering; they endure gradually building distress rather than acute crises, mirroring the characteristic Stannum pain pattern of slow crescendo and slow decline.

rubric_passages.Chest: "Chest so weak that he cannot talk; empty feeling in the chest." "Hoarseness, weakness, emptiness in the chest on beginning to sing, so that she was constantly obliged to stop and take a deep breath; at times a few expulsive coughs removed the hoarseness for a few minutes."
rubric_passages.Chill: the patient becomes oversensitive to cold, takes cold easily. When let alone every cold settled in the nerves and every draft caused neuralgias about the eyes, sensitive to every change in the weather, the hydrogenoid constitution of Grauvogl.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Paralytic symptoms; writers cramp; women cannot let go of the broom (Dros. cures most cases).
rubric_passages.Generalities: There is a history of increasing weakness, cachexia, catarrhal conditions, and neuralgia dating back over years. There is sensitiveness to pain and an increasing aversion to doing anything.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: "Very much exhausted from talking or reading aloud. Great lassitude from walking; weariness of the whole body, especially when ascending stairs great sense of weakness in larynx and chest, thence all over the body trembling worse from slow exercise."
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Menses too early and too profuse; bearing down in the uterine region; prolapsus uteri and vaginae.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Menses too early and too profuse; bearing down in the uterine region; prolapsus uteri and vaginae.
rubric_passages.Head: "Headache every morning, over one or the other eye, mostly the left, gradually extending over the whole forehead and increasing and decreasing gradually, often with vomiting." "Violent, glowing, beating pain." It is sometimes attended with burning. "Felt as if the head would burst with inward blows."
rubric_passages.Mind: There is sensitiveness to pain and an increasing aversion to doing anything, aversion to business in a man, and in a woman, to going about her housework; always tired, all work becomes irksome.
rubric_passages.Mind, quiet, quiet disposition: an increasing aversion to doing anything, aversion to business in a man, and in a woman, to going about her housework; always tired, all work becomes irksome.
rubric_passages.Mouth: it strings out of the mouth tasting sweetish, sometimes salty or sour.
rubric_passages.Respiration: "Oppressed breathing from ascending, from the slightest movement when lying down, in the evening, from coughing."
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: "Oppressed breathing from ascending, from the slightest movement when lying down, in the evening, from coughing."
rubric_passages.Sleep: Wakens in the morning with the chest filled with mucus, and coughs and expectorates, and yet some remains; he gags, retches and vomits.
rubric_passages.Stomach: "Cough in fatiguing paroxysms; epigastric region painful as if beaten."
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: "Cough in fatiguing paroxysms; epigastric region painful as if beaten."
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Colic better from pressure, lying on the stomach (Coloc., Cupr.); worse from motion; better from bending double.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: a pain beginning gradually, increasing steadily and then diminishing gradually. The pain has been likened to the pulling of a string, gradually increasing and gradually letting up.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning: "Violent, glowing, beating pain." It is sometimes attended with burning.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side: "Headache every morning, over one or the other eye, mostly the left, gradually extending over the whole forehead." Neuralgia of the left eye gradually increasing from 10 A.M. to noon.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: Always tired; it is an effort to work. "Very much exhausted from talking or reading aloud. Great lassitude from walking; weariness of the whole body, especially when ascending stairs great sense of weakness in larynx and chest, thence all over the body trembling worse from slow exercise."
rubric_passages.Mind, quiet: an increasing aversion to doing anything, aversion to business in a man, and in a woman, to going about her housework; always tired, all work becomes irksome.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Stannum is useful in warding off phthisis, and is a wonderful palliative in that disease. This remedy is frequently indicated in cases where the routinist would prescribe Bry., etc., in low potencies to loosen the cough. Stannum is not dangerous in phthisis, and will palliate the case if it is incurable.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, uterus: bearing down in the uterine region; prolapsus uteri and vaginae.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Colic better from pressure, lying on the stomach (Coloc., Cupr.); worse from motion; better from bending double. "Constipation; stools hard, dry, knotty, or insufficient and green." Inactive rectum, i. e., a paralytic state; even though there is much urging there is inability to pass the stool, which at times is soft.

profile.personality: A refined, sensitive individual who maintains strict self-control and suppresses emotions rather than expressing them openly. Excitable and easily aroused but rarely manifests anger outwardly, instead turning inward and suffering silently from pent-up feelings. Often intellectually oriented but physically and nervously depleted from sexual excesses or prolonged emotional suppression.
profile.mental_state: Marked by dullness, brain-fag, and loss of memory, with a characteristic sensation of numbness or woodenness in the head as if the brain were made of wood. Cannot concentrate, makes mistakes in writing and speaking, and struggles with simple mental tasks like arithmetic after episodes of suppressed indignation. The mind dwells excessively on sexual or grievance-related subjects, leading to further nervous exhaustion.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core pattern is suppressed indignation and pent-up wrath that produces profound physical and mental collapse—trembling, sleeplessness, and prostration. Becomes speechless from anger rather than expressing it, then suffers intensely from the consequences of self-control. Deep sensitivity to insult and injustice combined with hypersensitivity at every level—physical, emotional, and sensory—so that the slightest touch or provocation can shatter composure entirely.

rubric_passages.Back: backache, weak legs, relaxed organs, deficiency of vital heat and tendency to take cold
rubric_passages.Bladder: irritable bladder with frequent urging to urinate, lasting many days after suppressed wrath, after insults.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, frequent: Frequent urging to urinate, with a scanty discharge in thin stream or discharge of urine in drops; may be followed by a sensation as if the bladder were not fully emptied.
rubric_passages.Chest: Stitching pains directly through the chest to the back.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Stitching in the region of the heart; trembling of the body with nervous excitement is an excellent indication for Staph.
rubric_passages.Chill: deficiency of vital heat and tendency to take cold
rubric_passages.Extremities: Tetter on the hands, itches and burns in the evening after scratching; numbness in the tips of the fingers; arthritic nodosities on the fingers.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Effects from loss of blood, shock, from surgical operations, injuries from sharp instruments, incised wounds. Stinging, etc., in surgical wounds, cuts; colic after lithotomy, urging to stool, qualmishness, worse from drinking.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: Effects of onanism or sexual excesses; loss of memory, hypochondriasis, taciturnity, face sunken, abashed look, nocturnal emissions, backache, weak legs, relaxed organs, deficiency of vital heat and tendency to take cold, deep sunken, red, and lusterless eyes, hair falls out
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: In the female there is violent sexual excitement, nymphomania with extreme mental and physical impressions; mind has been dwelling too much on sexual subjects.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Very sharp, shooting pains in the ovary, which is exquisitely sore to touch; pains extend along crural regions and thighs.
rubric_passages.Head: Sensation as of a round ball in the forehead, sitting firmly there even when shaking the head.
rubric_passages.Mind: Excitable, easily aroused to anger, but seldom irascible, that is, easily disturbed and excited, but seldom manifests it. Suitable in cases where complaints come from pent up wrath, suppressed anger, suppressed feelings. The person becomes speechless from suppressed indignation, anger with indignation.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: These patients are irritable, easily fatigued, most excitable, and when they have to control their emotions they suffer intensely.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: a man has come into my office with blue lips, trembling hands, pains about the heart and all over, and he thinks he is going to die. He tells a story of an altercation and pent up wrath, and Staph. stops his trembling and quiets him. Without it he would have sleepless nights, brain-fag, prostration and headache.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Subject to chronic diarrhoea and to constipation. Colic, twitching, tearing pains in the abdomen. Diarrhoea from cold water, from eating, from indignation, anger, with flatulence of a terribly offensive odor like spoiled eggs.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Subject to chronic diarrhoea and to constipation.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: Hoemorrhoidal tumors are so sensitive that they cannot be touched.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Seminal emissions followed by great chagrin and mortification, prostration, dyspnoea.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: Seminal emissions followed by great chagrin and mortification, prostration, dyspnoea.
rubric_passages.Skin: Painful sensitiveness of the scalp, skin peels off, with itching and smarting, worse in the evening and from getting warm.
rubric_passages.Sleep: He has sleepless nights and many days of fatigue, brain-fag; for days and weeks he cannot add nor subtract, makes mistakes in writing and speaking
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Colic, twitching, tearing pains in the abdomen. Diarrhoea from cold water, from eating, from indignation, anger, with flatulence of a terribly offensive odor like spoiled eggs.

profile.personality: An intensely violent and turbulent constitution marked by wild, frenzied behavior including cursing, tearing clothes, and erotic displays. The individual oscillates between states of extreme agitation and profound suffering, with a haggard, pallid appearance when not in active delirium.
profile.mental_state: The mind is in constant uproar with vivid hallucinations of animals, ghosts, devils, and departed spirits, progressing from illusions the patient recognizes as false to fixed delusions they cannot be reasoned out of. Strange distortions of body image arise, with beliefs that the body is ill-shapen, elongated, or deformed. Delirium ranges from bland murmuring to furious raving with attempts to stab and bite, accompanied by incoherent, loquacious speech.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by extreme fear and anxiety, particularly triggered by darkness, running water, and bright light, with terror so intense that children awaken screaming and clinging to those nearby. A deep undercurrent of religious despair manifests as believing one has sinned beyond redemption, alternating with manic exhortation and prayer. Rage and violent laughter with sardonic expression cycle rapidly with states of melancholic hopelessness and profound suffering.

rubric_passages.Back: Hysterical convulsions of long standing, associated with spinal trouble; worse from fright.
rubric_passages.Back, coldness: During spasms, covered with cold sweat; sometimes almost as cold as ice; cold sweat in mania; this feature is equaled only by Camphor.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Hysterical convulsions of long standing, associated with spinal trouble; worse from fright.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Retention of urine, cannot pass it if he ceases to strain; old men who have lost power over the bladder, stream flows slowly, cannot make haste.
rubric_passages.Chill: During spasms, covered with cold sweat; sometimes almost as cold as ice; cold sweat in mania; this feature is equaled only by Camphor.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Violent convulsions involving every muscle of the body, opisthotonos, violent distortions, contraction of the limbs, biting of the tongue and bleeding from the passages.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: hot raging fever with hot head and cold extremities, violent delirium.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness, hands: hot raging fever with hot head and cold extremities, violent delirium.
rubric_passages.Generalities: High grade inflammation which it carries to the finish. Pus forms, abscesses with excruciating pain.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Puerperal convulsions and insanity. It has the septic nature.
rubric_passages.Head: Violent headache from walking in the sun, and from the heat of the sun. Aggravated all day and at night the patient must sit up because of increased pain on lying down; he is worse from every motion on jar.
rubric_passages.Mind: When considering Stram. the idea of violence comes into mind. One cannot look upon a patient who needs Stram., or who has been poisoned with it, without wondering at the tremendous turmoil, the great upheaval taking place in mind and body.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Convulsions in nervous, excitable people brought on by fright.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Throat and mouth dry, tongue dry, swollen, so that it fills the mouth, pointed, red like a piece of meat, bleeding from the mouth, sordes on the teeth, lips dry and cracked.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Diarrhoea copious, involuntary; abdomen tympanitic, involuntary urination.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Marked stupor, stertorous breathing, lower jaw dropped.
rubric_passages.Skin: Chronic abscesses, carbuncles, boils, abscesses in the joints, the left hip-joint is a special locality.
rubric_passages.Sleep: Sleep full of dreams and turmoil.
rubric_passages.Stomach: at times violent thirst yet dread of water.
rubric_passages.Stomach, thirst: at times violent thirst yet dread of water.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: High grade inflammation which it carries to the finish. Pus forms, abscesses with excruciating pain.
rubric_passages.Clinical, paralysis: old men who have lost power over the bladder, stream flows slowly, cannot make haste.
rubric_passages.Head, congestion: In cerebral congestions, the delirium subsides into unconsciousness the patient has the appearance of profound intoxication; pupils dilated or contracted.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness: Full of excitement, rage, everything is tumultuous, violent; the face looks wild, anxious, fearful.

profile.personality: The Sulphur type is the 'ragged philosopher' — a disheveled, sedentary intellectual absorbed in abstract speculation and invention, indifferent to personal appearance, cleanliness, and social convention. He is self-absorbed, ungrateful, and lives in disorder, caring little for the opinions or needs of others while believing himself superior to educated society.
profile.mental_state: The mind is marked by philosophical mania — an obsessive, fruitless tracing of causes to their origins, dwelling on unanswerable abstract questions without productive outcome. There is confusion of thought, inability to concentrate, aversion to systematic work, and a dullness upon waking that makes gathering oneself after sleep difficult. The patient may oscillate between inventive fixation and complete mental indolence.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern is one of deep selfishness combined with religious melancholy and despair — the patient may sink into moaning prayer, convinced he has sinned beyond redemption, or may become proudly delusional, imagining himself in possession of beautiful things while surrounded by rags. There is a fundamental dissatisfaction and satiety of life, longing for death, too lazy to rouse himself yet too unhappy to live, with startling nervousness and restless, dream-disturbed sleep.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: He cannot stand because the abdominal viscera hang down so; they seem to be falling.
rubric_passages.Head, congestion, vertex: Headaches at times in those who suffer constantly from great heat in the vertex; the top of the head is hot and burns and he wants cold cloths applied to the top of the head.
rubric_passages.Mouth: There is a general unhealthy condition of the mouth and tongue. Foul taste and foul tongue. Ulceration of the mouth and burning in the ulcers. In the aphthae there is burning, stinging. White patches in the mouth.
rubric_passages.Appetite, ravenous, canine, excessive: He also speaks of a hungry feeling, a desire for food, but when he comes to the table, he loathes the food, turns away from it, does not want it.
rubric_passages.Appetite, aversion, meat: There is a craving for stimulants, for alcohol, and an aversion to milk and meat; these latter make him sick and he loathes them.
rubric_passages.Back, weakness: The striking thing in Sulphur as to the back is pain in the back on rising from a seat, compelling him to walk bent, and he can only straighten up slowly after moving. The pain is principally in the lumbo-sacral region.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pressure: The tissues seem to take on weakness, so that very little pressure causes soreness, sometimes inflammation and suppuration. Bed sores come on easily in a Sulphur patient, as there is feeble circulation. Induration from pressure is also a strong feature.
rubric_passages.Appetite: The Sulphur patient is very thirsty. He is always drinking water. He wants much water. He also speaks of a hungry feeling, a desire for food, but when he comes to the table, he loathes the food, turns away from it, does not want it. He eats almost nothing, takes only the simplest and lightest things.
rubric_passages.Appetite, ravenous: There is emptiness occurring at 11 o'clock in the forenoon. If there is any time in the whole twenty-four hours that he feels hungry it is at 1 o'clock. It seems as though he cannot wait for his dinner.
rubric_passages.Appetite, aversion: There is a craving for stimulants, for alcohol, and an aversion to milk and meat; these latter make him sick and he loathes them.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, weakness: He cannot stand because the abdominal viscera hang down so; they seem to be falling. There is rawness, soreness, distension and burning, with diarrhoea with chronic diarrhoea.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, abscess: This remedy is useful in suppurations. It establishes all sorts of suppurating cavities, small abscesses and large abscesses; abscesses beneath the skin, in the cellular tissues and in internal organs.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, abscess, liver: Sulphur will often heal old fistulous pipes and turn old abscesses into a normal state, so that healthy pus will follow, when it is indicated by the symptoms. It will open abscesses that are very slow, doing nothing, it will reduce inflamed glands that are indurated and about to suppurate, when the symptoms agree.
rubric_passages.Generalities, heat, sensation of: Every part burns; burning where there is congestion; burning of the skin or a sensation of heat in the skin; burning here and there in spots; burning in the glands, in the stomach, in the lungs; burning in the bowels, in the rectum; burning and smarting in the hemorrhoids; burning when passing urine, or a sensation of heat in the bladder. There is heat here and there.
rubric_passages.Mind, dullness, sluggishness, difficulty: A patient needing Sulphur is often in a state of dullness and confusion of mind, with inability to collect the thoughts and ideas; lack of concentration. He will sit and meditate on no one thing continuously, making no effort to concentrate his mind upon anything. He wakes up in the morning with dullness of mind and fullness in the head and vertigo.
rubric_passages.Sleep, dreams, unpleasant: He is much disturbed by dreadful dreams and nightmare.
rubric_passages.Stomach, indigestion (includes complaint: The Sulphur patients are commonly dyspeptics, patients who can digest almost nothing. They must live on the simplest forms of food in order to have any comfort at all; cannot digest anything like ordinary diet.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, retarded: There is a catarrhal state of the bladder, constant urging to urinate and burning and smarting while urinating.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, pressing: There is enlargement and induration, with much painfulness, pressure and distress.
rubric_passages.Mind, dullness: A patient needing Sulphur is often in a state of dullness and confusion of mind, with inability to collect the thoughts and ideas; lack of concentration.
rubric_passages.Appetite, time: There is emptiness occurring at 11 o'clock in the forenoon. If there is any time in the whole twenty-four hours that he feels hungry it is at 1 o'clock. It seems as though he cannot wait for his dinner. There is this also about the Sulphur patient: he is very hungry about his customary mealtimes and, if the meal is delayed, he becomes weak and nauseated.

profile.personality: A deeply exhausted, hurried individual who rushes through everything yet never feels satisfied with the pace of life. Despite profound physical and mental depletion, there is a restless urgency—eating, working, and moving must all be done faster, creating an internal contradiction between weakness and driven impatience.
profile.mental_state: Marked prostration of mind with irresolution and unwillingness to answer questions. The mental state is characterized by a peculiar combination of extreme hurriedness and inability to concentrate, with a sense that nothing is done quickly or well enough by oneself or others.
profile.emotional_pattern: Pervading deep sadness with continuous weeping and an inconsolable quality—nothing can be done to please them. Intensely fretful and irritable over the slightest cause, with a sour dissatisfaction toward everyone around them, reflecting the same corrosive, excoriating quality seen throughout the physical symptom picture.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: Sinking, weak feeling in abdomen after stool. Weak feeling in abdomen, as though menses would come on.
rubric_passages.Chest: Weakness in the chest with burning and stitching pain. Pressure on left side of chest. Profuse haemorrhage from the lungs of dark fluid blood, after pneumonia, and during the climacteric period.
rubric_passages.Chill: It has chilliness, flashes of heat with sweat.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Black and blue spots on the limbs. Stitching pain in the shoulder joint on lifting the arm. Stitches in finger joints. Chafing of thighs after rising. Marked weakness in knees and ankles. Swollen veins of feet. Chilblains of frost-bitten parts. Twitching if fingers during sleep.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The sensation of quivering all over the body and in the limbs without visible trembling is a very strong symptom of Sulphuric acid, and especially if it is associated with weakness that has been of long standing. The exhaustion, excitability and hurried feeling are constant factors. The hemorrhagic disposition with many complaints.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side, right: The symptoms predominate on the right side.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: The sensation of quivering all over the body and in the limbs without visible trembling is a very strong symptom of Sulphuric acid, and especially if it is associated with weakness that has been of long standing. The exhaustion, excitability and hurried feeling are constant factors.
rubric_passages.Head: The brain seems loose and seems to fall to side lain on, better sitting perfectly still, worse walking. The blood flows strongly to the head and the feet become cold.
rubric_passages.Head, congestion, vertex: The blood flows strongly to the head and the feet become cold.
rubric_passages.Mind: Prostration of mind and body, with extreme sadness, weeps continuously. Nothing can be done to please him. Fretful and irritable over the slightest cause. He cannot eat and work fast enough. No one does anything to please him; in such a hurry if doing anything or going anywhere. All things must be done at once. Unwilling to answer. Irresolution.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Fretful and irritable over the slightest cause. He cannot eat and work fast enough. No one does anything to please him; in such a hurry if doing anything or going anywhere. All things must be done at once.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The sore mouth is one of its most important features. It is our most frequently indicated remedy for nursing sore mouth. The aphthous mouth of infant or mother with yellowish or whitish ulcers. Bloody saliva from mouth; vesicles in the mouth. Breath very offensive.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Hemorrhoids very sore, itching, painful during stool, in drunkards. In constipation the stool is in small balls.
rubric_passages.Skin: Blue-black spots on the skin from slight injury. Blood-red spots on the skin like those on a brook trout sometimes after injuries. Chafing easily, followed by ulceration. Boils and bedsores.
rubric_passages.Sleep, restless: Late falling asleep and wakens too early. Nightmare before menses.
rubric_passages.Stomach: He craves brandy and fruit. Loss of appetite and progressive weakness are strong features. Aversion to the smell of coffee. He cannot drink cold water, as it feels so cold in the stomach and makes him chilly. Violent, spasmodic hiccough, such as occurs in drunkards.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations: Sour belching. Sour vomiting. The teeth are always on edge from sour eructations. Coughing and belching sour fluids.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Labor-like pains in abdomen, extending to hips and back.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: The pains are bruised, burning, tearing, stitching, shooting and jerking. The pain comes on slowly and departs suddenly.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side: The symptoms predominate on the right side.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: The sensation of quivering all over the body and in the limbs without visible trembling is a very strong symptom of Sulphuric acid, and especially if it is associated with weakness that has been of long standing. The exhaustion, excitability and hurried feeling are constant factors.
rubric_passages.Appetite: He craves brandy and fruit. Loss of appetite and progressive weakness are strong features. Aversion to the smell of coffee.

profile.personality: A deeply weakened, depleted individual who has lost vitality and industriousness, often abandoning responsibilities and withdrawing from active life. They are indifferent to friends and find no delight in anything, presenting as passive, lamenting, and sad.
profile.mental_state: Marked cognitive decline with forgetfulness for faces, names, dates, and events, along with inability to calculate. There is a persistent sense of depersonalization — always feeling 'not himself' — accompanied by fears of insanity, aphasia, and progressive mental weakness bordering on imbecility.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by deep melancholia, despair of recovery, and a pervasive dread of both night and morning. Laughing and weeping occur without cause, reflecting emotional instability, while indifference to loved ones and loss of all pleasure signal a profound emotional flattening beneath the surface despair.

rubric_passages.Back: Rheumatic stiffness and lameness in back. Aching in whole spine.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Aching in whole spine. Pain in region of kidneys, aggravated after urinating. Pain in sacrum, aggravated while sitting. Pain in back, hip and thighs during the night.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Inflammation of joints. Rheumatism, muscles are caked in bard knots or lumps. Pain in limbs ameliorated by heat, aggravated from sunset to sunrise. Stiffness of all the joints.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Many symptoms are worse at night in bed, many come on in the evening and last till morning. From sundown to sunrise marks the time of many violent pains and sufferings. Some are better from heat, and some are better from cold air and cold applications, There is great prostration in the morning on waking.
rubric_passages.Head: Syphilitic invalids are often sufferers from violent neuralgic headaches. Violent pains in sides of head, forehead or temples. Pain from temple to temple, from ear to ear, one eye to occiput; supraorbital pains.
rubric_passages.Mind: Forgetful. Weak minded. Laughing and weeping without cause. He cannot remember faces, names, dates, events, books or places. He cannot calculate. Despair of recovery. Melancholia. Fears he is going insane. Imbecility. Indifferent to his friends, and feels no delight in anything.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Mouth and tongue ulcerated. Breath foetid. Tongue soft, spongy, easily indented in persons who have long taken Mercury. Paralysis of tongue, one-sided. Tongue red, excoriated, cracked and sore. Patches on tongue. Denuded patches. Red spots. Copious viscid saliva in mouth.
rubric_passages.Skin: The eruptions are numerous, but may be studied better by consulting the numerous works on syphilis, as this is not a study of the disease, but the nosode.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It has cured many cases of epilepsy. Epileptic convulsions after menses. When there is ulceration of legs, throat, mouth or other parts with no repair. Fistulous openings, exostoses, fissures, tubercles and warts have been cured promptly.
rubric_passages.Face: Neuralgia of face. Paralysis of one side of face. Tubercles and copper-colored eruption on face. It has palliated cancerous ulceration of face. Scabby eruption on face. It has cured rupia on the cheek. Papules and pustules.
rubric_passages.Head, pain: Violent pains in sides of head, forehead or temples. Pain from temple to temple, from ear to ear, one eye to occiput; supraorbital pains. Pain sometimes ameliorated by warmth. Bursting pains; fullness of head. Maddening pains all night, causing sleeplessness.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain: Pain in limbs ameliorated by heat, aggravated from sunset to sunrise. Rheumatic pains and swelling of joints of upper limbs. Neuralgia of limbs gradually, increasing, aggravated as the night goes on.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain, leg: Nightly pain and swelling in legs. Pains in lower extremities, preventing sleep, aggravated from hot applications, ameliorated by pouring cold water on them. Severe bone aches in legs at night in bed.
rubric_passages.Mouth, ulcers: Mouth and tongue ulcerated. Ulceration of soft palate. Caries of hard palate. Soft palate entirely destroyed. Bleeding from ulcers.
rubric_passages.Skin, eruptions: Syphilinum often does bring back the ulcers in the throat and the eruptions. The eruptions are numerous, but may be studied better by consulting the numerous works on syphilis, as this is not a study of the disease, but the nosode.
rubric_passages.Clinical, ulcers: When there is ulceration of legs, throat, mouth or other parts with no repair. Fistulous openings, exostoses, fissures, tubercles and warts have been cured promptly.
rubric_passages.Back, pain, evening: Many symptoms are worse at night in bed, many come on in the evening and last till morning.
rubric_passages.Back, pain, night: Pain in back, hip and thighs during the night.
rubric_passages.Face, eruptions: Tubercles and copper-colored eruption on face. Scabby eruption on face. It has cured rupia on the cheek. Papules and pustules.
rubric_passages.Extremities, night: Nightly pain and swelling in legs. Severe bone aches in legs at night in bed. Pain in back of feet and toes at night in bed. Pains often aggravated in warm bed at night. Pains drive him out of bed at night.
rubric_passages.Back, evening: Many symptoms are worse at night in bed, many come on in the evening and last till morning.
rubric_passages.Back, night: Pain in back, hip and thighs during the night.
rubric_passages.Head, night: Maddening pains all night, causing sleeplessness. Aggravated nights.
rubric_passages.Head, occiput: Violent crushing pains in occiput. Stupefying headaches in the forehead or occiput. Cutting pains in occiput.
Maddening pains all night, causing sleeplessness. Aggravated nights. Neuralgia of head beginning at 4 P.M., growing gradually worse until midnight and then gradually better, ceasing at daylight.
rubric_passages.Head, pain, night: Maddening pains all night, causing sleeplessness. Aggravated nights. Neuralgia of head beginning at 4 P.M., growing gradually worse until midnight and then gradually better, ceasing at daylight.

profile.personality: An intensely restless, hyperkinetic individual driven by constant need for movement—dancing, jumping, running—with marked cunning and deceptiveness, feigning illness and employing fox-like strategies. Deeply reactive to sensory stimuli, particularly music, which can either soothe or violently excite, and strongly averse to vivid colors (green, red, black).
profile.mental_state: The mind is dominated by extreme anxiety and agitation, with impaired memory, irritability, and paroxysms of insanity featuring threatening behavior, destructiveness, and violent outbursts including striking others and tearing clothing. Depraved imagination prevails with hallucinations of monsters, insects, strangers, and ghosts, alongside paranoid ideation of being insulted or assaulted, and a refusal to answer when questioned.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional landscape alternates between frenzied excitement—singing, dancing, and weeping simultaneously—and deep dementia with profound sadness. Consolation provokes weeping, contradiction triggers anger, and grief and excitement worsen all symptoms. There is a complete loss of shame with uncontrollable lascivious impulses, combined with a desire to withdraw into darkness and solitude when overwhelmed.

rubric_passages.Bladder: There is involuntary urination when coughing. In the pathogenesis the symptoms are much like cystitis and it has cured inflammation of the bladder.
