In keeping with these general symptoms there is spasmodic action of the bladder; spasmodic retention of urine; copious urine with emaciation and sugar.
rubric_passages.Chest: It has great difficulty in breathing very much like that which is found in cardiac troubles, such a pressure upon the chest with panting respiration and suffocative catarrh. Oppression in the chest when raising the arms and when lying on the left side. Rheumatic pains. Many pains through and in the chest.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Weakness, numbness and restlessness are always present. Rheumatic pains are numerous. The pains of the limbs are so great that he cannot stand the weight of the clothing. Heaviness and numbness of the upper limbs. Must move the hands constantly and pick the fingers from nervousness. He is moving the legs constantly; heaviness in the legs; bruised pains in the legs.
rubric_passages.Generalities: It is full of pains in the body and limbs; pains in the bones; pains in the arms and in the joints. The patient himself is always sensitive to cold, so the pains in the limbs are worse in cold air and from becoming cold. Cold damp weather aggravates all the symptoms. Walking in the open air when not cold ameliorates most of his symptoms. Open air ameliorates, rubbing ameliorates.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: There is weakness of all the limbs. Emaciation is so marked that it may be said sometimes that the flesh falls off from him.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: In the female also there is violent, uncontrollable sexual erethism. Menstrual flow too early and copious. Violent itching of the genitals extending far up into the vagina, worse at night. Pain and violent cramps in the uterus. Nymphomania has been cured by this remedy. Extreme hyperesthesia of the genitals. Fibroid tumors have been cured. Great relaxation of the muscles and displacement of the uterus. Strong bearing down feeling in the pelvis. Burning in the uterus; swelling and induration of the uterus.
rubric_passages.Head: Contortions and jerking of the head. Constantly rubs the head against something, sometimes it is the pillow when in bed. Throws the head from side to side, here and there. She has a sensation of hammers in the head. Burning heat in the head.
rubric_passages.Mind: The nervous manifestations of this remedy are almost indescribable and too numerous to mention. Anxiety and restlessness are words that prevail through all the conditions in it. Depraved imaginations prevail through all the proving. Loss of all shame. Desire to run about, to dance and jump up and down. Great fantastic dancing. Violence is a strong feature of the remedy. Violence with anger. Tears his clothing.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Anxiety and restlessness are words that prevail through all the conditions in it. The anxiety is felt sometimes in the mind, sometimes in the whole body, sometimes in the limbs and in the stomach. The extreme restlessness of the limbs is like Ars. Anxiety, restlessness, constant motion of the arms, legs, trunk and head. Restlessness of the limbs in the evening, in bed before going to sleep, like Ars. and Lyc.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Burning in the rectum. In the rectum there is pain, smarting, tenesmus and in the abdomen colic.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: It has cured most terrible and alarming constipation after cathartics and injections failed to effect a movement. The symptoms that guide to it are the continual tossing, anxiety, restlessness, rolling from side to side and rubbing the head against the pillow. There is no desire for stool. Most difficult stool.
rubric_passages.Respiration: It has great difficulty in breathing very much like that which is found in cardiac troubles, such a pressure upon the chest with panting respiration and suffocative catarrh.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: It has great difficulty in breathing very much like that which is found in cardiac troubles, such a pressure upon the chest with panting respiration and suffocative catarrh. Oppression in the chest when raising the arms and when lying on the left side.
rubric_passages.Skin: Creeping and crawling in the skin all over the body. Itching, biting and creeping all over the body marked in the limbs. Itching and burning. It has cured a dry itching eczema of the extremities and other parts of the skin after Ars. and Sulph. have failed. It is a very deep acting, long acting remedy and a most useful remedy in skin affections.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Aversion to food; aversion to meat especially, though craves raw food. Thirst for cold water. Has nausea and vomiting. Has bitter eructations. Has an empty all-gone feeling in the stomach, an anxious feeling in the stomach. Vomits all food taken. Burning pain in the stomach.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: There is weakness of all the limbs. Emaciation is so marked that it may be said sometimes that the flesh falls off from him.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness: Anxiety and restlessness are words that prevail through all the conditions in it. The extreme restlessness of the limbs is like Ars. Anxiety, restlessness, constant motion of the arms, legs, trunk and head. Restlessness of the limbs in the evening, in bed before going to sleep, like Ars. and Lyc.
rubric_passages.Appetite: Aversion to food; aversion to meat especially, though craves raw food.
rubric_passages.Appetite, desires: Aversion to food; aversion to meat especially, though craves raw food.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It has cured most terrible and alarming constipation after cathartics and injections failed to effect a movement. It has cured Diphtheria. It has cured palpitation with mitral murmurs. It has cured angina pectoris. Nymphomania has been cured by this remedy. Fibroid tumors have been cured. It has cured a dry itching eczema of the extremities and other parts of the skin after Ars. and Sulph. have failed. Sugar in the urine and it has cured diabetes.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: There is burning in the abdomen that extends down through the intestines. Sharp pain in the spleen. The liver is painful to touch and is swollen. Pain in both sides of the abdomen. The abdomen is distended with flatus. Subject to much colic. Shooting pains in the abdomen, anus and vagina at the same time. Severe pains in the lower abdomen.
rubric_passages.Head, pain: Headache in the evening; in the morning on waking. Cannot open the eyes. Bending head forward aggravates. Pains are pressing and often wander around from place to place in the head; violent pain in the occiput and temples at the same time.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations, empty: Has an empty all-gone feeling in the stomach, an anxious feeling in the stomach.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, flatulence: The abdomen is distended with flatus.
rubric_passages.Extremities, motion: Must move the hands constantly and pick the fingers from nervousness. He is moving the legs constantly. Anxiety, restlessness, constant motion of the arms, legs, trunk and head.
rubric_passages.Generalities, irritability, excessive ph: Excessive hyperesthesia; all the symptoms are worse from grief and excitement.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea: Constantly scraping of larynx and trachea to clear them of MUCUS. Loss of voice and hoarseness; loss of voice when talking. Dryness in the larynx and trachea. Burning from the throat down into the chest.
rubric_passages.Mind, hysteria: It is one of our high grade remedies for hysterical women. In the hysterical symptoms she is better from music. Her motions are ludicrous and she is even lascivious in her conduct. Great excitement from music; she sings until she falls with exhaustion. Tarentula patients feign all sorts of sickness, especially fainting. They not only imagine themselves sick, but they pretend to be sick when they are not.

profile.personality: A hypersensitive, nervous constitution marked by hysterical tendencies, oscillating between restless busyness that accomplishes nothing and complete aversion to work. The individual is profoundly reactive to environmental stimuli, particularly noise and motion, to a degree that penetrates the entire body and produces physical illness.
profile.mental_state: Mental depression and sadness alternate with paradoxical hilarity, joyousness, and singing, especially during headache. There is a characteristic disconnection from the body, such as feeling the vertex does not belong to her, and a confused desire state where the person wants food but cannot identify what. Aversion to work and business reflects deep mental fatigue rather than laziness.
profile.emotional_pattern: Anxiety, trembling, and a pervasive sense of vulnerability dominate, with fainting from the least exertion revealing emotional and physical fragility. Weeping from pain (especially toothache) and sighing point to a low threshold for emotional overwhelm. The core pattern is one of hysterical sensitivity where emotions rapidly translate into physical symptoms—particularly nausea, vertigo, and chilliness.

rubric_passages.Back: Very sensitive spine, aggravated from motion or, noise, a jar, stepping. Pain between scapula. Spinal anaemia. Itching of back and nape.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Very sensitive spine, aggravated from motion or, noise, a jar, stepping. Pain between scapula.
rubric_passages.Chest: Stitching in chest beneath left shoulder to throat. Quick consumption.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Complaints are ameliorated by warmth, and during rest. Fainting from least exertion, Chilliness, trembling and anxiety. So restless that she must keep busy, though she accomplishes nothing.
rubric_passages.Head: The headache is most violent, aggravated on motion, aggravated talking, aggravated from warm drinks, with nausea and vomiting. Sensitive to light and noise. Pain in forehead extending to occiput, aggravated from noise, motion, and cold air. Headache on beginning to move. Sensation as if vertex did not belong to her, as though she could lift it off.
rubric_passages.Mind: Sadness and mental depression. Hysterical conduct, hilarity. Aversion to work, and to his business. joyousness and singing with headache.
rubric_passages.Vertigo: Vertigo on closing the eyes, from motion, from stooping, on board a vessel, from every noise, with nausea, vomiting, and cold sweat. Awakens at 11 P.M. with vertigo and slow pulse. Vertigo with dim vision and pain in eyes. Vertigo and nausea from closing the eyes when kneeling in church. Vertigo like sea-sickness.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It cures the most stubborn cases of spinal irritation, when the symptoms agree. Chronic catarrh of the nose. Necrosis of bone. Quick consumption. Emaciation. Enlargement of glands.
rubric_passages.Head, pain: The headache is most violent, aggravated on motion, aggravated talking, aggravated from warm drinks, with nausea and vomiting. Sensitive to light and noise. Pain in forehead extending to occiput, aggravated from noise, motion, and cold air.
rubric_passages.Generalities, bones: The bones are sore. Pains in bones as if broken.
rubric_passages.Hearing: The hearing is very acute, Every least noise penetrates the whole body, especially the teeth, aggravates vertigo and causes nausea. Rushing noises in ears like a waterfall. Pressure about the ears.
rubric_passages.Vision: This remedy cures many nervous eye symptoms. Flickering, even when eyes are closed. Like a veil before the eyes. Double vision. Sensitive to light. Diplopia. Fluttering.
Very sensitive spine, aggravated from motion or, noise, a jar, stepping.
rubric_passages.Head, pain, noise, from: Pain in forehead extending to occiput, aggravated from noise, motion, and cold air.
rubric_passages.Hearing, acute: The hearing is very acute, Every least noise penetrates the whole body, especially the teeth, aggravates vertigo and causes nausea.
rubric_passages.Hearing, acute, noises (sounds), to: The hearing is very acute, Every least noise penetrates the whole body, especially the teeth, aggravates vertigo and causes nausea.
rubric_passages.Mind, sensitive, noise, to: Hysterical sensitivity with extreme aggravation from noise, motion and exertion marks this remedy as unique. The pains are aggravated from noise, and motion, and the nerves are in such a state of sensitivity that a painful thrill passes over the body in waves and nausea follows. Nausea from noise is strikingly strange.
rubric_passages.Mind, sensitive, noise, to, slightest: Every least noise penetrates the whole body, especially the teeth, aggravates vertigo and causes nausea.
rubric_passages.Mind, sensitive, oversensitive: Hysterical sensitivity with extreme aggravation from noise, motion and exertion marks this remedy as unique. The pains are aggravated from noise, and motion, and the nerves are in such a state of sensitivity that a painful thrill passes over the body in waves and nausea follows.
rubric_passages.Vision, flickering: Flickering, even when eyes are closed.

profile.personality: The Thuja constitutional type is secretive and deceptive by nature, able to control themselves among strangers while showing their true irritable, quarrelsome temperament only to those closest to them. They are fundamentally dishonest in presentation, with a disposition to cheat, and prefer to be alone with their peculiar fixed ideas.
profile.mental_state: The Thuja mind is dominated by fixed ideas that cannot be reasoned away — delusions of pregnancy, of animals living inside the body, of being followed, or of someone walking alongside them. There is a striking sensation that soul and body are separated, and a belief that they are made of glass and will break. These mental symptoms intensify as ovarian or reproductive pathology deepens.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern is one of violent irritability, intense jealousy, and quarrelsomeness directed primarily at intimate family members — the husband or mother — while maintaining a controlled facade with outsiders. There is a deep desire for isolation and withdrawal, with hysteria emerging under the pressure of physical suffering, particularly during menstruation when pain can drive the patient to cry aloud.

rubric_passages.Back: soreness in the bottom the feet and in the knees and particularly through the back and loins and sciatic nerves
rubric_passages.Back, pain: soreness in the bottom the feet and in the knees and particularly through the back and loins and sciatic nerves, in the knees and ankle joints.
rubric_passages.Bladder: inflammation of the bladder and urethra that is not gonorrhoeal; pus from the bladder; paralysis of the bladder, must wait a long time for the urine to start; retention of urine, continuous urging to urinate
rubric_passages.Chest: In the catarrh of the chest it produces an intense hacking cough, with expectoration in the morning of greenish mucus, sometimes a copious expectoration. It is often suited to old cases of pneumonia, in such individuals as have suppressed gonorrhoea, fig-wart gonorrhoea.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Sometimes it affects the upper extremities, but particularly the lower. Most violent aggravation when keeping still, like Rhus, great aching that increases so long as he keeps still, he is very often compelled to keep the bed, and then he constantly moves and turns.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The general appearance of the Thuya subject, if he has a characteristic picture, is that of a waxy, shiny face, it looks as if he had been smeared over with grease; and is often transparent, he is a sickly looking individual, looks as if entering upon some cachexia.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: if you meet a violent pain in the left ovary, coming on at the time of menstruation and continuing during the flow and extending down the thighs, but may be in every direction, it increases as the flow comes on, stinging, tearing, burning, bursting pains, as if the parts were being torn out, make her cry aloud, she goes into a hysterical state.
rubric_passages.Head: violent, intense, tearing headaches, tearing in the eye, ameliorated by heat. The eye-ball pains are better from heat and the rest are better in the cool open air.
rubric_passages.Mind: she wants to be alone and takes upon herself fixed ideas; that she is pregnant, or that an animal is in her bowels, she is followed, or that someone is walking beside her, thinks that soul and body are separated.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Where the ovaries have been affected for some time there will be mental symptoms, a most violent irritability, jealous, quarrelsomeness, ugliness.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Thuja has some striking bowel symptoms; gushing, watery morning diarrhoea, like water coming out of a bunghole.
rubric_passages.Skin: The skin manifests many symptoms. The perspiration is peculiar, it is sweetish honey, sometimes like garlic, strong and pungent. The skin looks unhealthy everywhere about the body and there is a copious sweat on first going to sleep, like Arsenic.
rubric_passages.Sleep: there is a copious sweat on first going to sleep, like Arsenic.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: must wait a long time for the urine to start; retention of urine, continuous urging to urinate, tearing in the urethra, feeling as if the urine were constantly running along the urethra, like Kali bich. and Petros.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Pain localized in small spots. A nail driven in the head, side of head and forehead, like Ignatia and Anacardium. These pains are intensified into tearing pains.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Thuja leads all medicines for symptoms coming from suppressed fig-warts. Thuja is pre-eminently a strong medicine when you have a trace of animal poisoning in the history, as snake bite, small-pox and vaccination.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, uterus: Cauliflower excrescences upon the cervix uteri, about the anus (like Nitricum acidum), about the labia majora and mucous membranes generally.
rubric_passages.Head, vertex: A nail driven in the head, side of head and forehead, like Ignatia and Anacardium.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Warts of a brownish color, especially if upon the abdomen the body; great brown spots, like liver spots, form upon the abdomen.

profile.personality: A restless, cosmopolitan type with a constant desire to travel, change surroundings, and seek something new — always wanting to go somewhere or find a new doctor. Constitutionally debilitated with inherited weakness, easily fatigued, and prone to relapsing conditions that never fully resolve.
profile.mental_state: Aversion to mental work with persistent, tormenting thoughts that crowd upon each other during the night. Hopelessness pervades many complaints, and the mind may border on insanity — intellectual symptoms and lung symptoms are notably interchangeable in this constitution.
profile.emotional_pattern: Anxious from evening until midnight, especially during fever, with a sullen, taciturn, and irritable disposition. Weary of life with a deep restlessness that drives the person to move, walk, and travel, as sitting still intensifies both physical and emotional suffering.

rubric_passages.Chest: Suffocation; worn in a warm room. Tubercular deposits in apices of lungs (left).
rubric_passages.Chill: Chilliness, evening; better in bed. Chill 5 P.M., with thirst. Cough before chill, during chill, and vomiting during fever. Wants to be covered during all stages. Extreme heat, with chilliness. Relapsing intermittents. Drawing in the limbs in the evening before the chill, and during the chill. He knows the chill is coming on because of the drawing in the limbs. Chill at 11 o'clock at night. Must be covered up during all stages, the chill, the fever and the sweat. The chilliness extends into the fever and into the sweat if there is any uncovering.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Aching, drawing pains in the limbs during rest, better by walking. Coldness of left foot and leg, evening in bed. Stitching pains in limbs during rest. Wandering pains in limbs - in joints. Pains all over the body, but mostly lower limbs. Aching, drawing, tearing, as if in bones, and nerves, during rest; better walking. Pains in bones lower limbs. Stiffness on beginning to move. Sore bruised joints. Pains all ameliorated by heat. Drawing pains in thighs. Stitching pains in limbs. Restless. Stiffness of lower limbs, evening.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Sensitive to every change of the weather, especially to cold, and to damp weather, and sometimes to warm damp weather, and to rainy weather. Always worse before a storm. Can feel every electric change in the weather. Becoming cold brings on all the symptoms pains, aches, distresses and sufferings.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: A gradually growing weakness, a gradually increasing fatigue.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: The uterus sags down and is heavy at the menstrual period, a relaxation, as if the inner parts would come out.
rubric_passages.Head: Tuberculinum cures the most violent and the most chronic periodical sick headaches, periodical nervous headaches. Coming every week; every two weeks; and the irregular periodicity coming under certain conditions, in damp weather, after overwork, from mental excitement, from overeating, disordered stomach.
rubric_passages.Mind: Hopelessness in many complaints. Aversion to mental work. Anxiety evening, until midnight. Anxiety during fever. Loquacity during fever. Weary of life. Cosmopolitan. Tormenting, persistent thoughts during the night. Thoughts intrude and crowd upon each other during the night.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Constipation, stool large and hard; then diarrhoea. Itching of the anus. Sudden diarrhoea before breakfast, with nausea.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Desire for deep breathing. Longs for the open air. Wants the doors and windows open.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: Suffocation in a warm room. Can find easy breathing only when riding in the cold wind.
rubric_passages.Skin: This remedy has cured red purplish eruptions that are nodular in character; the patient wants to sit all the time by the fire - itching in cold air, better by going to the fire, worse from scratching.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Emptiness in the abdomen, with faint feeling. Anxiety in the abdomen and stomach, much like the Sulphur sensation described. An all gone, hungry feeling, that drives him to eat.
rubric_passages.Appetite, desires, meat: Aversion to all foods. Such aversion to meat that it becomes impossible to eat it.
rubric_passages.Stomach, thirst: Thirst during the chill and heat, for large quantities of cold water.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: They are always tired. They take on sicknesses easily. They become anaemic; nervous; waxy or pale. Weakness after a short walk.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It cures most cases of adenoids and tuberculous glands of the neck.
rubric_passages.Face: The face becomes red, even to purple, during the chill, and during the heat.
rubric_passages.Face, heat: The face becomes red, even to purple, during the chill, and during the heat.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult, lying, while agg: Suffocation in a warm room. Can find easy breathing only when riding in the cold wind. Sits in the room covered with a cold sweat, but wants the air, wants fresh air.
rubric_passages.Stool: Stool large and hard; or, constipation alternating with diarrhoea.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, menses: Menses too early, too profuse, long lasting. Amenorrhoea. Dysmenorrheea.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult, lying: Suffocation in a warm room. Can find easy breathing only when riding in the cold wind. Sits in the room covered with a cold sweat, but wants the air, wants fresh air.

profile.personality: A highly excitable, nervous temperament most often seen in women and children, prone to hysterical and hypochondriacal states. The person is restless and cannot remain still, feeling compelled to move about, with complaints that constantly shift and wander from place to place.
profile.mental_state: The mind is in a state of extreme activity and tension, rapidly shifting between subjects and ideas with an ecstatic or hysterical quality. There are erroneous perceptions of identity—believing herself to be someone else, seeing imaginary animals and figures, especially at night. Mental symptoms arise during rest and in darkness, clearing when the person walks about.
profile.emotional_pattern: Deep sadness alternates with irritability and a morose, easily exasperated disposition. There is pronounced fear in the evening and in the dark, with an underlying hypersensitivity to all stimuli. Emotional states are unstable and paroxysmal, flaring during stillness and solitude, and temporarily relieved by motion and activity.

rubric_passages.Back: Pain in small of back during rest, ameliorated by walking. Rheumatic pains in scapula.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Pain in small of back during rest, ameliorated by walking.
rubric_passages.Chest: Jerking stitching pain in chest. Oppression of the chest with lump in the throat. Stitching in right side of chest and liver. Stitching in heart with pulse quick, small and weak.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Rheumatic pains in all the limbs, aggravated during rest after previous exertion, ameliorated walking. Drawing, jerking of limbs, and twitching of muscles during rest. Heaviness in limbs, drawing, feels as though must move the limbs but cannot.
rubric_passages.Generalities: All these general symptoms come on during rest, and are relieved by motion and moving about. Fainting easily. Slight exertion brings on symptoms. Complaints change about, and pains wander from place to place.
rubric_passages.Head: Violent nervous headaches in evening during rest, ameliorated by motion. Stupefying pains in head. Stitching, tearing pain. Sensation of great coldness in head. Headache from exposure to the heat and light of the sun.
rubric_passages.Mind: The mental state is often ecstatic or hysterical. The mind undergoes rapid changes in disposition and ideas. The mental symptoms come on at night; sees images, animals and men. The mental state is one of extreme activity, tension, excitement, passes from one subject to another.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Thickly coated tongue; rancid taste. Flat taste in mouth on waking.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Choking in throat pit on falling asleep; wakens as if suffocating. Inspirations grow less deep and more rapid until they cease; then she catches her breath by a sobbing effort, in spells.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Sensation as if a thread were hanging down the throat with salivation and vomiting. Voracious hunger with nausea. Symptoms aggravated when stomach is empty, ameliorated after breakfast.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Stitching pains all over the body during rest. Complaints change about, and pains wander from place to place.
rubric_passages.Head, congestion: Headache from exposure to the heat and light of the sun.
rubric_passages.Appetite: Voracious hunger with nausea. Symptoms aggravated when stomach is empty, ameliorated after breakfast. Complaints from fasting.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Distended abdomen. Cutting pain in abdomen. Colic. Cramps in hysterical women, in evening in, bed and after dinner.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: Stitching in heart with pulse quick, small and weak.
rubric_passages.Chest, pain: Jerking stitching pain in chest. Stitching in right side of chest and liver.
rubric_passages.Face: Face red and hot in open air. Stitching in face and teeth. Sudden jerking pain in the face. Twitching in the muscles and drawing pain in face. Neuralgia of face, aggravated during rest.
rubric_passages.Face, heat: Face red and hot in open air.
rubric_passages.Generalities, morning: Eructations, like spoiled eggs, morning. Pressure in the eyes in the morning.
rubric_passages.Head, pain: Violent nervous headaches in evening during rest, ameliorated by motion. Stupefying pains in head. Stitching, tearing pain. Pain in forehead and through the eyes. Tension and constriction of the scalp.
rubric_passages.Stool: Watery diarrhoea with curds in infants. Greenish papescent stool and blood with cramp in abdomen and tenesmus, in children. Worms in the stool.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, pressing: Pressure in the eyes in the morning.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain: Darting pains in arms and shoulders. Drawing in the muscles with stitching pains in arms. Crampy darting, tearing, like an electrical shock, repeatedly through the humerus, intensely painful. Pain along the sciatic when standing, ameliorated walking. Tearing pain in thigh upward to hip.
rubric_passages.Eye: Wild look in the eyes. Flashes of light before the eyes in the dark. Pressure in the eyes in the morning. Smarting in the eyes. Vision very sharp.

profile.personality: A restless, driven individual who compulsively needs to stay busy and occupied, often channeling energy into repetitive or purposeless activity. They oscillate between extremes of intense engagement and complete collapse, with a tendency toward religious preoccupation and moralistic fervor.
profile.mental_state: The mind is marked by violence, destructiveness, and delirium, with a compulsion to tear, cut, and destroy. There is a pronounced tendency toward religious mania—believing oneself divinely chosen, preaching loudly, exhorting others to repentance—alternating with states of silent, brooding melancholia and deep despair. Loquacity and rapid speech characterize the excited phases, while hopelessness and suicidal ideation mark the depressive ones.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern swings between wild, frenzied states of exaltation and profound, inconsolable grief over real or imagined misfortunes. There is deep-seated fear—of death, of damnation, of cosmic catastrophe—underlying the emotional life, with hysteria, weeping, and desperate screaming giving way to silent brooding and complete emotional withdrawal.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: Empty, all-gone feeling in the abdomen after stool.
rubric_passages.Back, coldness: Internal sensation of chilliness running from head to toes coming on when drinking.
rubric_passages.Chill: Chill and heat alternating, now here, now there, on single parts.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Full of rheumatic and neuralgic pains in the extremities; worse from the warmth of the bed; they drive him out of bed at night into the cold room and be must walk the floor for relief.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness, hands: cold to the finger-tips, with corresponding blueness, fairly purple
rubric_passages.Generalities: You would also wonder at the remarkable prostration attending the various groups of symptoms, complete relaxation and exhaustion, coldness. Profuse sweat, vomiting and diarrhea.
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness, fainting: Gastric catarrh, great weakness, cold, sudden sinking.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: Painful paralytic weakness in the limbs.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Girls at puberty suffer with dysmenorrhoea, hysterical mental states, diarrhea, and vomiting. During the menses they become cold as death, lips blue, extremities cold and blue, dreadful pains, sensation of sinking, mania to kiss everybody, hysteria with coldness at the menstrual period, copious sweat, vomiting, and diarrhoea, etc.
rubric_passages.Head: Violent rush of blood to the head, congestion of the head with coldness of the extremities. Head feels as if packed with ice, feels as if ice lay on the vertex and occiput (Calc.). Tension in the head as if the membranes were drawn tighter about the brain; compressive pains.
rubric_passages.Mind: The mental symptoms are marked by violence and destructiveness he wants to destroy, to tear something; he tears the clothes from the body.
rubric_passages.Mind, quiet, quiet disposition: Melancholia, head hangs down, sits brooding in silence.
rubric_passages.Skin: In the chronic mental troubles, the skin is dusky and dry with the exception of that on the forehead. But in acute complaints where physical symptoms predominate, as in dysmenorrhoea, acute insanity, etc., there is profuse sweat.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Nausea with weakness; is obliged to lie down; hysterical cramps in the stomach; cramps in the muscles of the abdomen like colic.

profile.personality: A deeply enfeebled, nervous constitution marked by extreme sensitivity to all sensory stimuli—noise, light, conversation—combined with an underlying slowness and sluggishness of all mental and physical functions. The patient appears prematurely aged, pallid, and withered, with a docile temperament that becomes irritable when provoked.
profile.mental_state: The mind is slow, weak, and forgetful, with poor memory and a characteristic need to have questions repeated before comprehending and answering them—staring blankly before the face lights up with understanding. There is marked mental prostration and exhaustion, progressing from dullness and stupor toward unconsciousness in severe states, yet with paradoxical startling and hypersensitivity to minor stimuli.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern is one of nervous exhaustion manifesting as oversensitivity and irritability—morose when others talk, distressed by conversation, yet fundamentally docile and compliant until pushed. There is a restless, fidgety quality especially in the extremities (notably the feet), reflecting an inner agitation trapped within a depleted system that cannot adequately discharge its tension.

rubric_passages.Back: Aching in the dorsal, lumbar, and sacral regions; better when walking and worse from rising from a seat.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Aching in the dorsal, lumbar, and sacral regions; better when walking and worse from rising from a seat.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Difficult expulsion of urine; paralysis of the bladder and tedious constipation associated with spinal symptoms; urine slow in starting; can pass it only when sitting and in some cases only when sitting leaning back against the seat with hard pressure.
rubric_passages.Chest: Constriction of the whole chest in weakly subjects.
rubric_passages.Chill: Always chilly; sensitive to the cold.
rubric_passages.Extremities: The great nervousness of Zinc. is manifested in the feet. You will notice a child or a woman keeping one foot going all the time, cannot keep it still.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The whole economy seems to be tired and feeble, so that when a girl approaches puberty and it is time for the menses to be established, but the flow does not appear, she goes into a decline.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: burning of the whole spine, creeping and crawling of the extremities
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: no matter what the violent symptoms are pains in the ovaries, in the uterus, hysterical excitement; as soon as the menstrual flow appears there is relief.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Violent pains in the ovaries relieved by the flow.
rubric_passages.Head: rolling of the head for days; eyes lusterless; body emaciated, involuntary discharges of faeces and urine in the bed
rubric_passages.Mind: Feeble children, feeble girls, mind feeble, memory poor.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Tendency to be docile, but when aroused irascible.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: The Zinc. patient is nervous and extremely sensitive, excitable, trembling, quivering, twitching of muscles, tearing pains along the course of the nerves, tingling, excited on the least provocation.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: The intestines are sluggish. The rectum becomes impacted. Difficult expulsion of urine; paralysis of the bladder and tedious constipation associated with spinal symptoms.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Constriction of the whole chest in weakly subjects.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: Constriction of the whole chest in weakly subjects.
rubric_passages.Skin: the skin looks withered; the face pallid, wrinkled, unhealthy, sickly.
rubric_passages.Stomach: The stomach is slow in digesting; sour vomiting.
rubric_passages.Back, weakness: paralytic weakness, emaciation, prostration; full of brain and spinal symptoms.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: urine slow in starting; can pass it only when sitting and in some cases only when sitting leaning back against the seat with hard pressure.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Full of neuralgic pains; tearing pains in all parts of the body when exposed to a draft; tension and drawing in various places.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning: burning of the whole spine, creeping and crawling of the extremities
rubric_passages.Clinical, paralysis: Limbs paralyzed; paresis and finally paralysis of one or both sides jerking, trembling and prostration.
rubric_passages.Head, congestion: The early stage will be that of congestion, and Bell. may palliate, but with the onset of the symptoms enumerated above, Zinc. is the only remedy that will cure.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness: Sensitive to every little noise, to people talking in the room, to crumpling of paper. Talking or listening is distressing; much talking of other people, even of those of who he is fond, affects his nerves and makes him morose.
rubric_passages.Clinical: After scarlet fever and badly treated meningitis; tubercular meningitis. I have carried these severe forms of brain disease through on Phosphorus, which has a picture somewhat like that of Zincum.
